description: Stage 2: QLoRA supervised fine-tuning of a small prover on the rough corpus and (separately) the fine corpus, holding everything else fixed, to produce the two policy-specific models compared in the main eval.
motivation: Produce the two policy-specific models whose held-out pass@k is compared.
formal_results: Planned - not run. No trained models / LoRA adapters / training logs in the repo; blocked on Modal credit rollover (early June 2026).
conclusions: The rough vs fine SFT runs - the core of the study - are unexecuted.
